## 3. Priorities & Struggles

**What he said matters most (his own words, highest weight):**
> *"It's not about the games I develop today. It's not about any of my dozens of projects. It's about what I'm going to start doing seriously in 6 months. Right now, it's only about understanding what's happening, understand what's worth pursuing and what is not. I have no idea. That's why I'm trying so many things. I need to be at the edge."*

This is the orienting truth. Julien is in an **explicit exploration and sense-making phase**. The goal is not to ship — it's to understand what deserves serious commitment. The proliferation of projects (blog, dancing, guitar, Grassroot Hoppers, staffing calendar, running) is intentional signal-gathering, not scatter.

**What he's avoiding (inferred, not stated):**
- Execution on any single project to the exclusion of exploration. He's explicitly not ready to commit.
- The shop as identity or primary focus.
